name: Peter's "Leeky" Potatoes - Mshol
recipeInstructions:
1. Love potatoes and love leeks? Combine them in this simple casserole for a dish you can't beat. Whether as a side dish or main course, it's sure to be loved!
2. In a casserole dish, single layer sliced potatoes, leeks (sliced diagonally), and cottage cheese. Season with salt to taste.
3. Top with a single layer of sliced potatoes.
4. Sprinkle Paprika for garnish.
5. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes or until the top is browned and the potatoes are tender when pierced with a sharp knife or skewer.
